name: Mexican Style Bow Ties
recipeIngredient: 1/2 pound ground chicken breast, skinless, cooked
15 ounces dark red kidney beans, undrained
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare bow tie pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. In a skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
3. Cook chicken, bell peppers, and onions until chicken is no longer pink and vegetables are tender.
4. Add beans, cumin, and chili powder; heat through.
5. In a mixing bowl, combine pasta, chicken mixture, tomato sauce, corn, and cheddar cheese.
6. In another bowl, combine yogurt and taco sauce.
7. Add to salad mixture and toss well.
